Character.title: Shining Warrior
Character.effects: *You can Summon this card by sacrificing 3 Melee creatures on your field.* Each time a Chain ends, this card gains 20 ATK and 15 DMG for each creature effect activated in that Chain (except this card).

Character.title: Squarstep King
Character.effects: *This card can be Summoned by the effect of the "King's move" or by removing every Move Score from the field (minimum 3) while every player controls a creature.* When this card is Summoned: Each players places 5 Move Scores on a creature they control. If a creature with at least 1 Move score is destroyed, remove 1 Move Score instead. If a player has no Move scores on their field after this card is Summoned, they lose the Match.

Character.title: Runesoul Paradox
Character.effects: Land cards you control becomes Merging. Once per turn, you can send 1 <Runeforge> card from your hand or field to the Graveyard, then shuffle 2 cards from your Graveyard and 2 from your opponent's Graveyard to the decks. Then, this card gains 10 ATK and DEF points.

Character.title: Immomento D'el Secundo
Character.effects: *If this card is added to the hand by card effect, you can Summon it.* Once per turn, if a card effect in a Chain (with length 2 or more effects) is activated: You can put the last effect to the end of that Chain as an Instant effect.
